Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order To Postpone Plaintiff'S Deposition And For Order Setting Discovery Sequence And Timing
Off Calendar Jun-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Ryan Lazon's Motion For Protective Order To Postpone Plaintiff's Deposition and For Order Setting Discovery Sequence and Timing is granted as it seeks to postpose Plaintiff's deposition until after service of Defendant's responses to the outstanding discovery which were previously due on May 19, 2006. Plaintiff's deposition shall take place at a date and location to be agreed upon by counsel no sooner than 10 days after and no later than 15 days after the service of those responses. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion & Motion For Protective Order To Serve Responses To Form Interrogs & Doc. Production Req'S; Mo For Atty Fees
Off Calendar Jun-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants Club Monaco U.S., LLC., Polo Ralph Lauren Corp.'s Motion For Extension Of Time And Protective Order To Serve Responses To First Set Of Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Requests For Production Of Documents, and Requests For Admissions is granted. Counsel shall meet and confer on a date for the responses to be served. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
